# setMaintainsBackForwardList(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sets whether to use a back-forward list.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func setMaintainsBackForwardList(_ flag: Bool)
```

## Parameters

- **flag**: If [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], clears the back-forward list and relinquishes ownership the page cache; otherwise, it does not.

## Discussion

The back-forward list maintains a page cache, so applications that do not use the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebView-swift.class/goForward()] or [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebView-swift.class/goBack()] methods should disable it.

## Moving Back and Forward

- **backForwardList**: The receiver’s back-forward list.
- **canGoBack**: A Boolean that indicates whether the previous location can be loaded.
- **goBack()**: Loads the previous location in the back-forward list.
- **goBack(_:)**: An action method that loads the previous location in the back-forward list.
- **canGoForward**: A Boolean that indicates whether the next location can be loaded.
- **goForward()**: Loads the next location in the back-forward list.
- **goForward(_:)**: An action method that loads the next location in the back-forward list.
- **go(toBackForwardItem:)**: Loads a specific location from the back-forward list and sets it as the current item.
